items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布官方声明：因美国政府出口管制指令，立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的全部访问。相对此前的常规发布，模型尚未广泛铺开即被合规性阻断；已申请接入 Fable/Mythos 的客户将收到访问拒绝。
items.backend_focus: 紧急：把代码/配置中所有引用 claude-fable-5-*、claude-mythos-5-* 的 model 字段立即替换为仍可用的 Claude Opus 4.8（或其他允许的 Sonnet/Haiku 版本）；清空引用这两个模型的 prompt cache 键，避免路由到已下线端点；关注 Anthropic 后续是否发布退款与替代迁移路径。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，一种新的团队协作使用 Claude 的方式。摘要中混入大量无关政策/招聘/Glasswing 信息，关键产品能力描述缺失，属于公告摘要不完整；无法判断是否涉及 API、SDK 或计费变更。
items.backend_focus: 暂不行动。公告摘要未给出 Claude Tag 的接口形态、定价或与现有 Claude.ai/Console 的关系；建议在 Anthropic 补全技术文档前不要在生产环境尝试接入，待澄清后另行评估。

Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，Opus 系列升级，编码、agentic 任务、专业工作性能更强，并考虑 [摘要被截断]。相对此前的 Opus 4.7，是同一档位的版本号递增，定价/限流/区域可用性公告中未给出。摘要被截断需关注后续完整 release notes。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：把 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-7（或更早 Opus 4.x）切换为 claude-opus-4-8，注意 max_tokens、context window、tool use 行为是否变化；关注 Anthropic 完整 release notes 中是否列出 deprecation 时间线与 pricing 调整。摘要被截断的部分需打开原链接确认。
